hero.title: Rezervitoo
hero.subtitle:
Discover the best hotels, apartments, hostels, tourist properties, and travel agencies in Algeria with ease and security.
With Rezervitoo, you can book or communicate directly with the property owner in simple steps.
home.howItWorksDesc: Three simple steps to find your rental
home.step1Desc: Create your listing in minutes with photos and details.
home.step2Desc: Search and filter to find the perfect place for your stay.
home.step3Desc: Call the provider directly to book your accommodation.
home.ctaDesc: Reach thousands of potential renters across Algeria
footer.tagline: Find the perfect place to rent. Simple, fast, and reliable.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Redefining the booking experience in Algeria. We bridge the gap between travelers and providers with a dual-ecosystem built for speed, transparency, and trust.
about.missionDesc: rezervitoo is an Algerian digital platform specialized in booking tourist stays and properties within Algeria. Our goal is to digitize the local tourism sector, facilitate the search and booking process for travelers, and connect them directly with hotel owners, apartments, hostels, and travel agencies.
about.goalDesc: Digitizing the tourism sector in Algeria and providing the best experience for travelers.
about.visionDesc: We believe in transparency, simplicity, and supporting the local economy.
about.valueTrustDesc: We build trust through verification and transparency
about.valueInnovationDesc: We constantly innovate to improve your experience
about.valueQualityDesc: We commit to the highest quality standards
about.valueSupportDesc: Continuous support to ensure your success
about.clientTitle: For Travelers: Discover and Book Easily
about.clientDesc: Our application focus on seamless discovery, secure bookings, and personalized wishlists.
about.providerTitle: For Providers: Grow Your Business with Rezervitoo
about.providerDesc: For property owners and travel agencies. A powerhouse dashboard to manage listings, track bookings, and analyze revenue on the go.
about.providerFeature4: Advanced Digital Marketing for Your Services

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We offer a complete suite of services designed for both travelers and travel professionals across Algeria.
services.accommodationDesc: From budget-friendly hostels to luxury villas and 5-star hotels. Find the perfect stay anywhere in Algeria.
services.travelPackagesDesc: Exclusively curated tours and excursions. Experience the Sahara or the Mediterranean coast like never before.
services.providerDashboardDesc: Comprehensive tools for property owners and agencies to manage their business, track bookings, and grow revenue.
services.securePaymentsDesc: Fast and reliable payment processing with multi-currency support and encrypted transactions.
services.verifiedListingsDesc: Every listing on our platform undergoes a rigorous verification process to ensure quality and safety.
services.supportDesc: Our dedicated support team is always here to help you with booking inquiries or platform troubleshooting.
services.ctaDesc: Whether you're looking for a stay or looking to host, we've got you covered.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1: We collect personal information that you provide directly to us, such as your name, email address, and phone number when you create an account or make a booking.
privacy.section2: We use your information to facilitate bookings, communicate with you about your stay, and improve our services. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.section3: We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. Your data is stored on secure servers and encrypted using industry-standard technology.
privacy.section4: We use cookies to enhance your experience on our site, such as keeping you logged in and remembering your preferences.
privacy.section5: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.section1: By accessing and using RizerVitoo, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
terms.section2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
terms.section3: Bookings made through our platform are subject to the specific cancellation policies set by the provider. RizerVitoo acts as an intermediary and is not liable for disputes between users and providers.
terms.section4: Users are prohibited from posting fraudulent listings, harassing other users, or attempting to compromise the platform's security.
terms.section5: RizerVitoo shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of our services.

providerProfile.docsUnderReviewDesc: Your documents have been received and are being reviewed by our team. This usually takes 24–48 hours.
providerProfile.accountVerifiedDesc: Your account is fully verified. Your listings are automatically approved and visible to the public.
providerProfile.docsSubmitted: Documents submitted! Your account is now under review.
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: How can I create a new account?
faq.a1: Click 'Sign Up', enter your basic details like name, email, and password, then check your email to verify your account.
faq.a2: Yes, registration on Rezervitoo is completely free, and you can start booking services without any advance fees.
faq.q3: What should I do if I forget my password?
faq.a3: You can easily reset your password via the 'Forgot Password' option on the login page; instructions will be sent to your email.
faq.q4: Can I edit my account data after registration?
faq.a4: Of course, you can edit your name, email, or phone number through the 'My Account' section after logging in.
faq.a5: Yes, Rezervitoo ensures the protection of your data using high-security protocols, and your information will not be shared with any third party.
